sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73951" key="o)mfaliko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀμφᾰλ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n73951.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀμφάλιος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phan.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
